creator: vg72i@proton.me
text:
After the last update of lazarus (v.2.0.10.0) and fpc (v.3.2.0) after starting the Transmission Remote GUI (v.5.18.0), when connecting to the daemon, a window appears with an error:

/ Error: Duplicate object member: "status" /

No issues connecting to the daemon through the web browser.
